ι : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
M : Type u_3
N : Type u_4
inst✝⁵ : CommRing R
inst✝⁴ : AddCommGroup M
inst✝³ : Module R M
inst✝² : AddCommGroup N
inst✝¹ : Module R N
P : RootPairing ι R M N
inst✝ : CharZero R
⊢ Submodule.span R
      (Set.range
        ⇑({ toFun := List.get RootPairing.EmbeddedG2.allCocoeffs, inj' := ⋯ }.trans
            { toFun := fun x => Int.cast ∘ x, inj' := ⋯ })) =
    ⊤

proof:
rw [eq_top_iff, ← (Pi.basisFun R (Fin 2)).span_eq]
    apply span_mono
    rintro - ⟨i, rfl⟩
    fin_cases i
    · exact ⟨2, by ext j; fin_cases j <;> rfl⟩
    · exact ⟨0, by ext j; fin_cases j <;> rfl⟩
